location: Dropped by Albinauric Wolfback Archers south-southwest of the Ordina, Liturgical Town Site of Grace in the Consecrated Snowfield — a cluster of four archers (one mounted on a wolf, three seated together). The stationary rooftop archers inside the nearby Ordina Evergaol also drop it.
tactics: From Ordina, Liturgical Town grace, head south-southwest to find the archer group — one rides a wolf, three sit together nearby
It's a rare drop (roughly 4% base at 100 Discovery) — expect to kill several, or use a Discovery-boosting item/talisman to speed things up
The stationary archers on rooftops inside the Ordina Evergaol are a separate, easier-to-repeat source — don't mix them up with the evergaol's actual boss fight (Divine Beast Dancing Lion)
The wolf-mounted archer can outrun you on foot — chase on Torrent or bait it into range
lore: A finely silver-worked longbow carried by the mounted archers of the Albinauric people who patrol the Consecrated Snowfield, built for accurate fire at range rather than raw stopping power.

builds.name: Dex Bow build
builds.why: Pure Str/Dex physical scaling with no elemental split means Dex investment carries both damage and handling; a Keen affinity pushes Dex scaling further
